# shelly_devicepower_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The ID of the DevicePower component instance.
- `ip` (String) The IP address of the Shelly device.

### Optional

- `battery` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--battery))

<a id="nestedatt--battery"></a>
### Nested Schema for `battery`

Optional:

- `percent` (Number) Battery charge level in % (null if valid value could not be obtained)
